description.value:
Created from the concentrated psychic echoes of anguish and pain, a despair crystal is a fist-sized, red gem.

Activate—Crack Crystal 1 (manipulate) You crack the despair crystal open, causing it to release its pent-up pain at a single target within 60 feet. The target is dealt @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19|basic] save. On a failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round (for 1 minute on a critical failure).

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-25: The Hollowed Shell
